name: pyhartig
summary: A Python implementation of Olaf Hartig's algebra for Knowledge Graph Construction. Developed for the 'Engineering For Research I' course (M1 SMART Computing) at Nantes Université (LS2N - GDD Team).
author_email: Anthony MUDET <anthony.mudet@etu.univ-nantes.fr>, Léo FERMÉ <leo.ferme@etu.univ-nantes.fr>, Mohamed Lamine MERAH <mohamed.merah@etu.univ-nantes.fr>
